sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n67952" key="misale/candros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μῑσ-ᾰλέξανδρος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n67952.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">hating Alexander</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0026.tlg003.perseus-grc1:73" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aeschin.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.73</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.344b</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
